weights.name: W
weights.desc: Weight matrix [rows, cols] stored transposed as [M, K] row-major

strategies.name: output
strategies.notes: Parallelize across output rows; each thread computes subset of y.

constraints.notes: Q4_K requires K dimension multiple of 256 for dequantization. Most aggressive quantization.

impl.c_declaration: void gemv_q4_k_q8_k(float *y, const void *W, const void *x_q8, int M, int K);

parity.notes: Compare dequantized output against numpy fp32 matmul

notes: Generalized matrix-vector multiplication for Q4_K weights with Q8_K activation input. Used for decode path with K-type quantization.
